subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, the receipts are being sent. In truth, your labors and those of Ḥájí at the Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء قبوضات ارسال میگردد فی الحقیقه زحمات شما و حاجی در آستان
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
